name: Lanbril

requirements.initiate:
to have 5 cult skills at 50%+ one of which needs to be Cult Runic Affinity, Examiners need
to be convinced at 3 of them.Must have been lay member for five years

cultSkills: to be convinced at 3 of them.Must have been lay member for five years Rune levels need to have 3 cult skills at 100% one of which needs to be Cult Runic Affinity
Bold skills are mandatory Cult Skills (Oath is taken at initiate) Combat style (any)
